events.description: Come out to the Indy Winter Farmers Market every Saturday from 9am – 12:30pm, until April 25th. With over 50 vendors, there is a little something for everyone!

events.title: Soul Libations: A Black Beverage Tasting
events.description: Soul Libations: A Black Beverage Tasting is coming to Indy!  presented by @indy_bccJoin us Saturday, February 28 | 4–8 PM for an evening of culture, connection, and incredible Black-owned beverage brands.Free to attend • Tasting tickets available • Bottles available for purchase on-siteHosted @sipeasyindy @theampindy  Emcee: Thomas @sparkle_soxx GriffinCome sip, support, and celebrate Black excellence.

events.title: CNC Catch All Tray Workshop
events.description:
Welcome to Machyne Makerspace’s CNC Catch All Tray Workshop!



This class is a fantastic opportunity to delve into the world of CNC routing and create a beautiful hardwood catch-all tray. 
Unique Catch-All Tray Creation: Craft a personalized tray from our selection of high-quality hardwoods. The size and design will vary, allowing for a truly custom piece. 
What You’ll Learn and Do : Achieve certification and learn to operate this sophisticated machine with confidence. Expertise on the Shopbot

events.title: Welding & CNC Plasma Cutter Workshop
events.description:
Discover the art of welding at Machyne Makerspace! 




Join our welding workshop and craft a set of unique bookends, perfect for both beginners and experienced welders. 
What You’ll Learn and Do: 
Metal Fabrication: Master basic techniques, including cutting square tube stock using a cold saw, chop saw, and angle grinder. 
MIG Welding: Experience hands-on MIG welding with a Lincoln Electric Easy MIG 180, practicing tack welds and beads. 
Finishing Skills: Get tips on fixing materials, cleaning

events.title: STARTUP MASTERY | Mastering Customer Acquisition: Cracking Enterprise Sales
events.description:
Master enterprise sales & proven B2B growth strategies with Authenticx and Recovery Force Health. Presented with Plug and Play Indiana. 


Cracking the code of enterprise sales is one of the most significant hurdles for any scaling startup. Moving from early adopters to large-scale contracts with health systems, pharmaceutical giants, and major hospitals requires more than just a great product—it requires a repeatable, masterful sales motion.
As part of our Startup Mastery series, join us for an

events.title: Free Cowork Friday: February 2026
events.description:
One Friday a month, we open our doors to anyone interested in trying out coworking! Potential new members can come in and enjoy free coffee & coworking as they test drive what a Launch Fishers membership is all about. We provide a reliable place to work for all sorts of people: entrepreneurs, remote workers, consultants, and more! 
Benefits of Launch Fishers membership: a comfortable workspace, a great community of fellow coworkers, phone booths, meeting & conference rooms, in-house coffee shop,

events.title: LEARN AT LAUNCH | Beyond the Product: How Smart Leaders Innovate Their Entire Business to  Stay Ahead of Disruption
events.description:
Hear from Omni TouchPoint on rethinking innovation, sparking new strategies, and leading through disruption with ease. Breakfast provided. 

Is your innovation strategy limited to products and technology? In a rapidly changing environment, true leadership requires looking deeper. This interactive workshop invites growth-oriented leaders to rethink innovation by exploring how value is created, delivered, and experienced across the entire business system.
The Experience
This is an interactive lead

events.title: Coffee & Conversation: March 2026
events.description:
Mornings are better when we get together. ☕️ 
Imagine starting your day with a vibrant buzz, not just from your coffee, but from connecting with fellow local innovators. Our monthly Coffee & Conversation event is designed to do just that. 
Join us on the second Thursday of every month at 8:30 AM for a morning of free coffee, delicious donuts and making valuable connections that can help propel your business forward. This event is specifically crafted to bring Fishers businesses and entrepreneurs

events.title: March Madness Kickoff Party
events.description:
THIS EVENT IS OPEN TO LAUNCH FISHERS MEMBERS ONLY. 
The madness begins on Thursday March 19th with the NCAA’s First Round of games! 🏀 📺 So come kick back, watch the games, and enjoy a free lunch on us! We’ll have the games streaming with food and drinks served.

events.title: Upcoming events.
events.description: Join us forInvesting in Indiana Life Sciences: Why Now, Why Here—A Fireside Chat. This conversation will explore why Indiana has emerged as a compelling hub for life sciences innovation, highlighting current investment momentum, sector strengths, and opportunities across the state’s growing ecosystem. Designed for investors, entrepreneurs, and ecosystem leaders, the discussion will offer insights into why now is a pivotal moment to invest in Indiana life sciences—and what makes the region unique

events.title: Does Timing Create Better Investors? What Biological Timing Reveals About Investment Decisions
events.description: Why do some investors consistently make better calls—especially when decisions are fast, uncertain, and high-stakes? Research suggests the answer isn’t only experience or pattern recognition, but when those decisions are made. This workshop draws on Regan Stevenson’s research to examine how subtle and other unexpected drivers, such as investors’ biological timing preferences, influence risk tolerance, judgment quality, and investment outcomes.

events.title: Indy.rb - The Indianapolis Ruby Brigade Monthly Meetup
events.description:
Indyrb - Indianapolis Ruby Brigade
Join us to talk about Ruby, work projects, hack on something, or just get a drink or bite & enjoy the company.

We are mixing it up again and meeting this month at The Ale Emporium Castleton location

events.title: March 2026 CINLUG Meeting -- Intro to RISC-V
events.description:
CINLUG | Central Indiana Linux Users Group
At this March’s meeting, we are fortunate to have Matt St. Onge[1] speak on a topic we’ve never covered before: RISC-V! Matt will take us on an informal deep dive into the recent evolution of this new Open Source instruction set architecture (ISA). How is RISC-V used today? What binds Linux and RISC-V? How will RISC-V impact the future? Come find out the answers to these questions and more!

Our Wednesday, March 4th meeting starts at 18:30 (6:30 PM) EST
